prompt_en: Listen and understand: saying what you think

prompt_en: Listen and understand: saying what you think

prompt_en: Listen and understand: saying what you think

prompt_en: Listen and understand: saying what you think

prompt_en: Listen and understand: saying what you think

prompt_en: Listen and understand: saying what you think

prompt_en: Listen and understand: giving reasons and examples
text: 因為今天很冷，所以我穿外套。

prompt_en: Listen and understand: giving reasons and examples

prompt_en: Listen and understand: giving reasons and examples
text: 因為這家餐廳的牛肉麵很好吃，所以我們常常來。

prompt_en: Listen and understand: giving reasons and examples
text: 因為他沒有帶錢，所以不能買東西。

prompt_en: Listen and understand: giving reasons and examples
text: 因為這件衣服的顏色不適合我，所以我換了一件。

prompt_en: Listen and understand: giving reasons and examples
text: 因為他昨天生病了，所以今天沒有來上班。

prompt_en: Listen and understand: giving reasons and examples
text: 因為這家店的咖啡比較便宜，所以我喜歡來這裡。

prompt_en: Listen and understand: giving reasons and examples
text: 因為他工作很忙，所以沒有時間去旅行。

prompt_en: Listen and understand: giving reasons and examples
text: 因為這條路常常塞車，所以我改搭捷運。

prompt_en: Listen and understand: giving reasons and examples
text: 我喜歡台灣小吃，例如滷肉飯和牛肉麵。

text: 他有很多優點，比如很認真又很聰明。

prompt_en: Listen and understand: giving reasons and examples
text: 為了省錢，他寧願走路也不坐捷運，例如去公司。

prompt_en: Listen and understand: giving reasons and examples
text: 由於天氣太冷，他不想出門，比如昨天。

prompt_en: Listen and understand: giving reasons and examples
text: 我比較喜歡紅茶，例如綠茶不如紅茶香。

prompt_en: Listen and understand: giving reasons and examples
text: 既然你覺得太貴，我們可以找更便宜的，比如那家店。

prompt_en: Listen and understand: giving reasons and examples
text: 他解釋遲到的原因，例如塞車和下雨。

prompt_en: Listen and understand: giving reasons and examples
text: 為了健康，他寧願吃青菜也不吃肉，比如中午。

prompt_en: Listen and understand: giving reasons and examples
text: 這家餐廳的缺點很多，比如服務態度不好。

prompt_en: Listen and understand: transactional independence checkpoint
text: 如果你明天有空的話，我們就一起去台北玩。

prompt_en: Listen and understand: transactional independence checkpoint
text: 如果這個便當太貴的話，我就買飯糰。

prompt_en: Listen and understand: transactional independence checkpoint
text: 如果天氣很冷的話，你就要穿外套。
pinyin: Rúguǒ tiānqì hěn lěng dehuà, nǐ jiù yào chuān wàitào.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: transactional independence checkpoint
text: 如果他不喜歡喝咖啡的話，我們就喝茶。

prompt_en: Listen and understand: transactional independence checkpoint
text: 如果下雨的話，我就不去公園散步。

text: 如果你想要省錢的話，我們就坐公車。

prompt_en: Listen and understand: transactional independence checkpoint
text: 如果這個手機太舊的話，我就買新的。
pinyin: Rúguǒ zhège shǒujī tài jiù dehuà, wǒ jiù mǎi xīn de.
pinyin_numeric: ru2guo3 zhe4ge shou3ji1 tai4 jiu4 de0hua4, wo3 jiu4 mai3 xin1 de0.
translation_en: If this phone is too old, I will buy a new one.
translation_ko: 이 핸드폰이 너무 오래됐으면 새 것을 살게요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: transactional independence checkpoint
text: 如果她今天很忙的話，我們就改天見面。
pinyin: Rúguǒ tā jīntiān hěn máng dehuà, wǒmen jiù gǎitiān jiànmiàn.
pinyin_numeric: ru2guo3 ta1 jin1tian1 hen3 mang2 de0hua4, wo3men jiu4 gai3tian1 jian4mian4.
translation_en: If she is very busy today, we will meet another day.
translation_ko: 그녀가 오늘 매우 바쁘면 다른 날 만나요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: transactional independence checkpoint
text: 如果這個問題太難的話，你就問老師。
pinyin: Rúguǒ zhège wèntí tài nán dehuà, nǐ jiù wèn lǎoshī.
pinyin_numeric: ru2guo3 zhe4ge wen4ti2 tai4 nan2 de0hua4, ni3 jiu4 wen4 lao3shi1.
translation_en: If this question is too difficult, you should ask the teacher.
translation_ko: 이 문제가 너무 어려우면 선생님께 물어보세요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: transactional independence checkpoint
text: 如果我們沒有帶傘的話，就要買新的。
pinyin: Rúguǒ wǒmen méiyǒu dài sǎn dehuà, jiù yào mǎi xīn de.
pinyin_numeric: ru2guo3 wo3men mei2you3 dai4 san3 de0hua4, jiu4 yao4 mai3 xin1 de0.
translation_en: If we don't bring an umbrella, we will have to buy a new one.
translation_ko: 우산을 가져오지 않았으면 새 것을 사야 해요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: transactional independence checkpoint
text: 雖然這件衣服很漂亮，但是太貴了。
pinyin: Suīrán zhè jiàn yīfú hěn piàoliang, dànshì tài guì le.
pinyin_numeric: sui1ran2 zhe4 jian4 yi1fu2 hen3 piao4liang5, dan4shi4 tai4 gui4 le5.
translation_en: Although this piece of clothing is very pretty, it's too expensive.
translation_ko: 이 옷이 예쁘긴 하지만 너무 비싸요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: transactional independence checkpoint
text: 雖然我喜歡喝咖啡，但是今天想喝茶。
pinyin: Suīrán wǒ xǐhuān hē kāfēi, dànshì jīntiān xiǎng hē chá.
pinyin_numeric: sui1ran2 wo3 xi3huan1 he1 ka1fei1, dan4shi4 jin1tian1 xiang3 he1 cha2.
translation_en: Although I like drinking coffee, today I want to drink tea.
translation_ko: 커피 마시는 걸 좋아하지만 오늘은 차를 마시고 싶어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: transactional independence checkpoint
text: 雖然這家餐廳的牛肉麵很好吃，但是服務態度不好。
pinyin: Suīrán zhè jiā cāntīng de niúròumiàn hěn hǎochī, dànshì fúwù tàidù bù hǎo.
pinyin_numeric: sui1ran2 zhe4 jia1 can1ting1 de5 niu2rou4mian4 hen3 hao3chi1, dan4shi4 fu2wu4 tai4du4 bu4 hao3.
translation_en: Although this restaurant's beef noodles are delicious, the service attitude is not good.
translation_ko: 이 식당의 소고기 국수는 맛있지만 서비스 태도가 좋지 않아요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: transactional independence checkpoint
text: 雖然他很有錢，但是他不太大方。
pinyin: Suīrán tā hěn yǒu qián, dànshì tā bù tài dàfāng.
pinyin_numeric: sui1ran2 ta1 hen3 you3 qian2, dan4shi4 ta1 bu4 tai4 da4fang1.
translation_en: Although he is very rich, he is not very generous.
translation_ko: 그는 돈이 많지만 별로 대범하지 않아요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: transactional independence checkpoint
text: 雖然今天天氣很冷，但是我還是想去公園走路。
pinyin: Suīrán jīntiān tiānqì hěn lěng, dànshì wǒ háishì xiǎng qù gōngyuán zǒulù.
pinyin_numeric: sui1ran2 jin1tian1 tian1qi4 hen3 leng3, dan4shi4 wo3 hai2shi4 xiang3 qu4 gong1yuan2 zou3lu4.
translation_en: Although the weather is very cold today, I still want to go for a walk in the park.
translation_ko: 오늘 날씨가 매우 춥지만 저는 그래도 공원에 산책하러 가고 싶어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: transactional independence checkpoint
text: 雖然這個手機很新，但是功能跟舊的一樣。
pinyin: Suīrán zhège shǒujī hěn xīn, dànshì gōngnéng gēn jiù de yíyàng.
pinyin_numeric: sui1ran2 zhe4ge5 shou3ji1 hen3 xin1, dan4shi4 gong1neng2 gen1 jiu4 de5 yi2yang4.
translation_en: Although this phone is very new, its functions are the same as the old one.
translation_ko: 이 핸드폰은 아주 새것이지만 기능은 옛날 것과 같아요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: transactional independence checkpoint
text: 雖然我已經吃過早餐了，但是現在又有點餓。
pinyin: Suīrán wǒ yǐjīng chī guò zǎocān le, dànshì xiànzài yòu yǒudiǎn è.
pinyin_numeric: sui1ran2 wo3 yi3jing1 chi1 guo4 zao3can1 le5, dan4shi4 xian4zai4 you4 you3dian3 e4.
translation_en: Although I have already eaten breakfast, I am a little hungry again now.
translation_ko: 아침을 이미 먹었지만 지금 또 좀 배고파요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: transactional independence checkpoint
text: 雖然這家便利商店的東西比較便宜，但是離我家很遠。
pinyin: Suīrán zhè jiā biànlì shāngdiàn de dōngxī bǐjiào piányi, dànshì lí wǒ jiā hěn yuǎn.
pinyin_numeric: sui1ran2 zhe4 jia1 bian4li4 shang1dian4 de5 dong1xi1 bi3jiao4 pian2yi5, dan4shi4 li2 wo3 jia1 hen3 yuan3.
translation_en: Although things at this convenience store are relatively cheap, it's very far from my home.
translation_ko: 이 편의점은 물건이 비교적 싸지만 우리 집에서 아주 멀어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: transactional independence checkpoint
text: 雖然他不會說中文，但是他很努力學。
pinyin: Suīrán tā bù huì shuō zhōngwén, dànshì tā hěn nǔlì xué.
pinyin_numeric: sui1ran2 ta1 bu4 hui4 shuo1 zhong1wen2, dan4shi4 ta1 hen3 nu3li4 xue2.
translation_en: Although he can't speak Chinese, he studies very hard.
translation_ko: 그는 중국어를 못 하지만 아주 열심히 배워요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: transactional independence checkpoint
text: 雖然我打算明天去台北，但是因為颱風，所以可能不去了。
pinyin: Suīrán wǒ dǎsuàn míngtiān qù Táiběi, dànshì yīnwèi táifēng, suǒyǐ kěnéng bù qù le.
pinyin_numeric: sui1ran2 wo3 da3suan4 ming2tian1 qu4 Tai2bei3, dan4shi4 yin1wei4 tai2feng1, suo3yi3 ke3neng2 bu4 qu4 le5.
translation_en: Although I plan to go to Taipei tomorrow, because of the typhoon, I might not go.
translation_ko: 내일 타이베이에 갈 계획이지만 태풍 때문에 아마 안 갈 거예요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: telling a simple personal story
text: 我本來想買那個包包，可是後來覺得太貴了，結果沒買。
pinyin: Wǒ běnlái xiǎng mǎi nà ge bāobāo, kěshì hòulái juéde tài guì le, jiéguǒ méi mǎi.
pinyin_numeric: wo3 ben3lai2 xiang3 mai3 na4 ge bao1bao1, ke3shi4 hou4lai2 jue2de tai4 gui4 le, jie2guo3 mei2 mai3.
translation_en: I originally wanted to buy that bag, but later I thought it was too expensive, so in the end I didn't buy it.
translation_ko: 원래 그 가방을 사고 싶었는데, 나중에 너무 비싸다고 생각해서 결국 사지 않았어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: telling a simple personal story
text: 他本來打算去公園散步，可是後來突然下雨了，結果他待在家裡。
pinyin: Tā běnlái dǎsuàn qù gōngyuán sànbù, kěshì hòulái túrán xià yǔ le, jiéguǒ tā dāi zài jiā lǐ.
pinyin_numeric: ta1 ben3lai2 da3suan4 qu4 gong1yuan2 san4bu4, ke3shi4 hou4lai2 tu2ran2 xia4 yu3 le, jie2guo3 ta1 dai1 zai4 jia1 li3.
translation_en: He originally planned to go for a walk in the park, but later it suddenly rained, so he ended up staying at home.
translation_ko: 그는 원래 공원에 산책하러 가려고 했는데, 갑자기 비가 와서 결국 집에 있었어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: telling a simple personal story
text: 我本來想吃牛肉麵，可是後來發現那家餐廳已經關門了，結果我去吃水餃。
pinyin: Wǒ běnlái xiǎng chī niúròu miàn, kěshì hòulái fāxiàn nà jiā cāntīng yǐjīng guān mén le, jiéguǒ wǒ qù chī shuǐjiǎo.
pinyin_numeric: wo3 ben3lai2 xiang3 chi1 niu2rou4 mian4, ke3shi4 hou4lai2 fa1xian4 na4 jia1 can1ting1 yi3jing1 guan1 men2 le, jie2guo3 wo3 qu4 chi1 shui3jiao3.
translation_en: I originally wanted to eat beef noodles, but later I found out that restaurant was already closed, so I went to eat dumplings instead.
translation_ko: 원래 소고기 국수를 먹고 싶었는데, 나중에 그 식당이 문을 닫았다는 걸 알게 되어서 결국 만두를 먹으러 갔어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: telling a simple personal story
text: 她本來要跟朋友一起去看電影，可是後來朋友臨時有事，結果她自己去了。
pinyin: Tā běnlái yào gēn péngyou yīqǐ qù kàn diànyǐng, kěshì hòulái péngyou línshí yǒu shì, jiéguǒ tā zìjǐ qù le.
pinyin_numeric: ta1 ben3lai2 yao4 gen1 peng2you3 yi1qi3 qu4 kan4 dian4ying3, ke3shi4 hou4lai2 peng2you3 lin2shi2 you3 shi4, jie2guo3 ta1 zi4ji3 qu4 le.
translation_en: She originally was going to watch a movie with her friend, but later her friend had something come up, so she went by herself.
translation_ko: 그녀는 원래 친구와 함께 영화를 보러 가려고 했는데, 친구가 갑자기 일이 생겨서 혼자 갔어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: telling a simple personal story
text: 我本來覺得今天心情不好，可是後來遇到一個老朋友，結果很開心。
pinyin: Wǒ běnlái juéde jīntiān xīnqíng bù hǎo, kěshì hòulái yù dào yī ge lǎo péngyou, jiéguǒ hěn kāixīn.
pinyin_numeric: wo3 ben3lai2 jue2de jin1tian1 xin1qing2 bu4 hao3, ke3shi4 hou4lai2 yu4 dao4 yi1 ge lao3 peng2you3, jie2guo3 hen3 kai1xin1.
translation_en: I originally felt in a bad mood today, but later I ran into an old friend, and in the end I was very happy.
translation_ko: 오늘 기분이 안 좋다고 생각했는데, 나중에 오랜 친구를 만나서 결국 매우 기뻤어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: telling a simple personal story
text: 他本來想學中文，可是後來覺得太難了，結果他放棄了。
pinyin: Tā běnlái xiǎng xué zhōngwén, kěshì hòulái juéde tài nán le, jiéguǒ tā fàngqì le.
pinyin_numeric: ta1 ben3lai2 xiang3 xue2 zhong1wen2, ke3shi4 hou4lai2 jue2de tai4 nan2 le, jie2guo3 ta1 fang4qi4 le.
translation_en: He originally wanted to learn Chinese, but later he thought it was too difficult, so he gave up.
translation_ko: 그는 원래 중국어를 배우고 싶었는데, 나중에 너무 어렵다고 생각해서 포기했어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: telling a simple personal story
text: 我本來打算早上出門，可是後來因為太累了，結果睡到中午。
pinyin: Wǒ běnlái dǎsuàn zǎoshang chūmén, kěshì hòulái yīnwèi tài lèi le, jiéguǒ shuì dào zhōngwǔ.
pinyin_numeric: wo3 ben3lai2 da3suan4 zao3shang5 chu1men2, ke3shi4 hou4lai2 yin1wei4 tai4 lei4 le, jie2guo3 shui4 dao4 zhong1wu3.
translation_en: I originally planned to go out in the morning, but later because I was too tired, I ended up sleeping until noon.
translation_ko: 원래 아침에 외출하려고 했는데, 너무 피곤해서 결국 정오까지 잤어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: telling a simple personal story
text: 她本來很緊張，可是後來發現事情很簡單，結果她鬆了一口氣。
pinyin: Tā běnlái hěn jǐnzhāng, kěshì hòulái fāxiàn shìqíng hěn jiǎndān, jiéguǒ tā sōng le yī kǒu qì.
pinyin_numeric: ta1 ben3lai2 hen3 jin3zhang1, ke3shi4 hou4lai2 fa1xian4 shi4qing2 hen3 jian3dan1, jie2guo3 ta1 song1 le yi1 kou3 qi4.
translation_en: She was originally very nervous, but later she found out the matter was very simple, so she breathed a sigh of relief.
translation_ko: 그녀는 원래 매우 긴장했는데, 나중에 일이 아주 간단하다는 걸 알고 안도의 한숨을 쉬었어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: telling a simple personal story
text: 我本來記得要帶鑰匙，可是後來出門的時候忘記了，結果進不了家門。
pinyin: Wǒ běnlái jìde yào dài yàoshi, kěshì hòulái chūmén de shíhou wàngjì le, jiéguǒ jìn bù liǎo jiā mén.
pinyin_numeric: wo3 ben3lai2 ji4de yao4 dai4 yao4shi5, ke3shi4 hou4lai2 chu1men2 de5 shi2hou5 wang4ji4 le, jie2guo3 jin4 bu4 liao3 jia1 men2.
translation_en: I originally remembered to bring my keys, but later I forgot when I went out, so I couldn't get into the house.
translation_ko: 원래 열쇠를 챙겨야 한다는 걸 기억했는데, 나중에 외출할 때 잊어버려서 집에 들어갈 수 없었어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: telling a simple personal story
text: 他本來想告訴我一個秘密，可是後來他覺得還是不要說比較好，結果他沒說。
pinyin: Tā běnlái xiǎng gàosu wǒ yī ge mìmì, kěshì hòulái tā juéde háishì bù yào shuō bǐjiào hǎo, jiéguǒ tā méi shuō.
pinyin_numeric: ta1 ben3lai2 xiang3 gao4su4 wo3 yi1 ge mi4mi4, ke3shi4 hou4lai2 ta1 jue2de hai2shi4 bu4 yao4 shuo1 bi3jiao4 hao3, jie2guo3 ta1 mei2 shuo1.
translation_en: He originally wanted to tell me a secret, but later he thought it was better not to say it, so he didn't.
translation_ko: 그는 원래 나에게 비밀을 말하려고 했는데, 나중에 말하지 않는 게 낫다고 생각해서 결국 말하지 않았어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: telling a simple personal story
text: 因為我昨天忘記帶鑰匙，所以今天早上很緊張。
pinyin: Yīnwèi wǒ zuótiān wàngjì dài yàoshi, suǒyǐ jīntiān zǎoshang hěn jǐnzhāng.
pinyin_numeric: yin1wei4 wo3 zuo2tian1 wang4ji4 dai4 yao4shi5, suo3yi3 jin1tian1 zao3shang5 hen3 jin3zhang1.
translation_en: Because I forgot to bring my keys yesterday, I was very nervous this morning.
translation_ko: 어제 열쇠를 가져오는 것을 잊어버렸기 때문에 오늘 아침에 매우 긴장했어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: telling a simple personal story
text: 因為他早上出門的時候遇到塞車，所以上班遲到了。
pinyin: Yīnwèi tā zǎoshang chūmén de shíhou yùdào sāichē, suǒyǐ shàngbān chídào le.
pinyin_numeric: yin1wei4 ta1 zao3shang5 chu1men2 de5 shi2hou5 yu4dao4 sai1che1, suo3yi3 shang4ban1 chi2dao4 le5.
translation_en: Because he encountered a traffic jam when he left home in the morning, he was late for work.
translation_ko: 그가 아침에 집을 나설 때 교통 체증을 만났기 때문에 출근에 지각했어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: telling a simple personal story
text: 因為我發現錢包不見了，所以覺得很難過。
pinyin: Yīnwèi wǒ fāxiàn qiánbāo bùjiàn le, suǒyǐ juéde hěn nánguò.
pinyin_numeric: yin1wei4 wo3 fa1xian4 qian2bao1 bu2jian4 le5, suo3yi3 jue2de5 hen3 nan2guo4.
translation_en: Because I found my wallet was missing, I felt very sad.
translation_ko: 지갑이 없어진 것을 알게 되었기 때문에 매우 슬펐어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: telling a simple personal story
text: 因為他告訴我一個有趣的故事，所以我們都很開心。
pinyin: Yīnwèi tā gàosu wǒ yī gè yǒuqù de gùshì, suǒyǐ wǒmen dōu hěn kāixīn.
pinyin_numeric: yin1wei4 ta1 gao4su5 wo3 yi1 ge4 you3qu4 de5 gu4shi4, suo3yi3 wo3men5 dou1 hen3 kai1xin1.
translation_en: Because he told me an interesting story, we were all very happy.
translation_ko: 그가 재미있는 이야기를 해 주었기 때문에 우리 모두 매우 기뻤어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: telling a simple personal story
text: 因為我記得今天是媽媽的生日，所以晚上要回家吃飯。
pinyin: Yīnwèi wǒ jìde jīntiān shì māma de shēngrì, suǒyǐ wǎnshang yào huí jiā chīfàn.
pinyin_numeric: yin1wei4 wo3 ji4de5 jin1tian1 shi4 ma1ma5 de5 sheng1ri4, suo3yi3 wan3shang5 yao4 hui2 jia1 chi1fan4.
translation_en: Because I remember today is Mom's birthday, I'm going home for dinner tonight.
translation_ko: 오늘이 엄마 생일이라는 것을 기억하기 때문에 저녁에 집에 가서 밥을 먹을 거예요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: telling a simple personal story
text: 因為他後來知道真相了，所以不再生氣。
pinyin: Yīnwèi tā hòulái zhīdào zhēnxiàng le, suǒyǐ bù zài shēngqì.
pinyin_numeric: yin1wei4 ta1 hou4lai2 zhi1dao4 zhen1xiang4 le5, suo3yi3 bu2 zai4 sheng1qi4.
translation_en: Because he later learned the truth, he was no longer angry.
translation_ko: 그가 나중에 진실을 알게 되었기 때문에 더 이상 화내지 않았어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: telling a simple personal story
text: 因為我昨天很晚才睡覺，所以今天早上起不來。
pinyin: Yīnwèi wǒ zuótiān hěn wǎn cái shuìjiào, suǒyǐ jīntiān zǎoshang qǐ bù lái.
pinyin_numeric: yin1wei4 wo3 zuo2tian1 hen3 wan3 cai2 shui4jiao4, suo3yi3 jin1tian1 zao3shang5 qi3 bu4 lai2.
translation_en: Because I went to bed very late yesterday, I couldn't get up this morning.
translation_ko: 어제 아주 늦게 잤기 때문에 오늘 아침에 일어나지 못했어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: telling a simple personal story
text: 因為他以前沒吃過牛肉麵，所以覺得很新鮮。
pinyin: Yīnwèi tā yǐqián méi chīguò niúròumiàn, suǒyǐ juéde hěn xīnxiān.
pinyin_numeric: yin1wei4 ta1 yi3qian2 mei2 chi1guo4 niu2rou4mian4, suo3yi3 jue2de5 hen3 xin1xian1.
translation_en: Because he had never eaten beef noodles before, he found it very novel.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: telling a simple personal story
text: 因為我出門前忘記帶傘，所以後來被雨淋濕了。

prompt_en: Listen and understand: telling a simple personal story

prompt_en: Listen and understand: telling stories with interruption and questions

text: 問路不如用地圖來得準確。

prompt_en: Listen and understand: where you are from, why you are learning, what you do

prompt_en: Listen and understand: where you are from, why you are learning, what you do

prompt_en: Listen and understand: meeting a local and chatting for several minutes
text: 對了，你最近忙嗎？

prompt_en: Listen and understand: meeting a local and chatting for several minutes

prompt_en: Listen and understand: meeting a local and chatting for several minutes

prompt_en: Listen and understand: meeting a local and chatting for several minutes

prompt_en: Listen and understand: meeting a local and chatting for several minutes

translation_en: What are your hobbies?
translation_ko: 취미가 무엇인가요?

prompt_en: Listen and understand: meeting a local and chatting for several minutes
text: 我最近很忙，你呢？
pinyin: Wǒ zuìjìn hěn máng, nǐ ne?
pinyin_numeric: wo3 zui4 jin4 hen3 mang2, ni3 ne0
translation_en: I've been very busy lately, and you?
translation_ko: 요즘 너무 바빠요, 당신은요?

prompt_en: Listen and understand: meeting a local and chatting for several minutes
text: 週末打算做什麼呢？
pinyin: Zhōumò dǎsuàn zuò shénme ne?
pinyin_numeric: zhou1 mo4 da3 suan4 zuo4 shen2 me0 ne0
translation_en: What do you plan to do this weekend?
translation_ko: 주말에 뭐 할 계획인가요?

prompt_en: Listen and understand: meeting a local and chatting for several minutes
text: 我們一起喝咖啡，好嗎？
pinyin: Wǒmen yīqǐ hē kāfēi, hǎo ma?
pinyin_numeric: wo3 men0 yi1 qi3 he1 ka1 fei1, hao3 ma0
translation_en: Shall we have coffee together?
translation_ko: 우리 같이 커피 마실까요?

prompt_en: Listen and understand: meeting a local and chatting for several minutes
text: 你覺得這家餐廳怎麼樣呢？
pinyin: Nǐ juéde zhè jiā cāntīng zěnme yàng ne?
pinyin_numeric: ni3 jue2 de0 zhe4 jia1 can1 ting1 zen3 me0 yang4 ne0
translation_en: What do you think of this restaurant?
translation_ko: 이 식당 어때요?

prompt_en: Listen and understand: meeting a local and chatting for several minutes
text: 我喜歡看電影，你呢？
pinyin: Wǒ xǐhuān kàn diànyǐng, nǐ ne?
pinyin_numeric: wo3 xi3 huan1 kan4 dian4 ying3, ni3 ne0
translation_en: I like watching movies, and you?
translation_ko: 저는 영화 보는 걸 좋아해요, 당신은요?

prompt_en: Listen and understand: meeting a local and chatting for several minutes
text: 改天有空再見面，好嗎？
pinyin: Gǎitiān yǒu kòng zài jiànmiàn, hǎo ma?
pinyin_numeric: gai3 tian1 you3 kong4 zai4 jian4 mian4, hao3 ma0
translation_en: Let's meet another day when you're free, okay?
translation_ko: 다음에 시간 되면 또 만나요, 괜찮죠?

prompt_en: Listen and understand: meeting a local and chatting for several minutes
text: 你的中文說得真不錯，學多久了呢？
pinyin: Nǐ de zhōngwén shuō de zhēn bùcuò, xué duō jiǔ le ne?
pinyin_numeric: ni3 de0 zhong1 wen2 shuo1 de0 zhen1 bu2 cuo4, xue2 duo1 jiu3 le0 ne0
translation_en: Your Chinese is really good; how long have you been studying?
translation_ko: 중국어 정말 잘하시네요, 얼마나 배우셨어요?

prompt_en: Listen and understand: meeting a local and chatting for several minutes
text: 其實我也很喜歡台灣小吃，你呢？
pinyin: Qíshí wǒ yě hěn xǐhuān táiwān xiǎochī, nǐ ne?
pinyin_numeric: qi2 shi2 wo3 ye3 hen3 xi3 huan1 tai2 wan1 xiao3 chi1, ni3 ne0
translation_en: Actually, I also really like Taiwanese street food, and you?
translation_ko: 사실 저도 대만 길거리 음식을 좋아해요, 당신은요?

prompt_en: Listen and understand: meeting a local and chatting for several minutes
text: 下次再聊，再見！
pinyin: Xià cì zài liáo, zàijiàn!
pinyin_numeric: xia4 ci4 zai4 liao2, zai4 jian4
translation_en: Let's chat again next time, goodbye!
translation_ko: 다음에 또 얘기해요, 안녕!

prompt_en: Listen and understand: arrive at a new place, ask directions, buy something, make small talk
text: 請問，車站怎麼走？
pinyin: Qǐngwèn, chēzhàn zěnme zǒu?
pinyin_numeric: qing3wen4, che1zhan4 zen3me zou3?
translation_en: Excuse me, how do I get to the station?
translation_ko: 실례합니다, 역은 어떻게 가나요?

prompt_en: Listen and understand: arrive at a new place, ask directions, buy something, make small talk
text: 一直走，然後在路口右轉。
pinyin: Yīzhí zǒu, ránhòu zài lùkǒu yòu zhuǎn.
pinyin_numeric: yi1zhi2 zou3, ran2hou4 zai4 lu4kou3 you4 zhuan3.
translation_en: Go straight, then turn right at the intersection.
translation_ko: 계속 직진하시다가 교차로에서 우회전하세요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: arrive at a new place, ask directions, buy something, make small talk
text: 請問，這本書多少錢？
pinyin: Qǐngwèn, zhè běn shū duōshao qián?
pinyin_numeric: qing3wen4, zhe4 ben3 shu1 duo1shao qian2?
translation_en: Excuse me, how much is this book?
translation_ko: 실례합니다, 이 책은 얼마인가요?

prompt_en: Listen and understand: arrive at a new place, ask directions, buy something, make small talk
text: 可以算便宜一點嗎？
pinyin: Kěyǐ suàn piányí yīdiǎn ma?
pinyin_numeric: ke3yi3 suan4 pian2yi2 yi1dian3 ma0?
translation_en: Can you make it a little cheaper?
translation_ko: 조금 깎아주실 수 있나요?

prompt_en: Listen and understand: arrive at a new place, ask directions, buy something, make small talk
text: 我給你一百塊，你找我五十塊。
pinyin: Wǒ gěi nǐ yī bǎi kuài, nǐ zhǎo wǒ wǔ shí kuài.
pinyin_numeric: wo3 gei3 ni3 yi1 bai3 kuai4, ni3 zhao3 wo3 wu3 shi2 kuai4.
translation_en: I give you 100 dollars, you give me 50 dollars change.
translation_ko: 100위안을 드리면, 50위안을 거슬러 주세요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: arrive at a new place, ask directions, buy something, make small talk
text: 我住在這附近，我們可以一起聊天。
pinyin: Wǒ zhù zài zhè fùjìn, wǒmen kěyǐ yīqǐ liáotiān.
pinyin_numeric: wo3 zhu4 zai4 zhe4 fu4jin4, wo3men ke3yi3 yi1qi3 liao2tian1.
translation_en: I live near here, we can chat together.
translation_ko: 저는 이 근처에 살아요, 우리 함께 이야기할 수 있어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: arrive at a new place, ask directions, buy something, make small talk
text: 請問，圖書館在對面嗎？
pinyin: Qǐngwèn, túshūguǎn zài duìmiàn ma?
pinyin_numeric: qing3wen4, tu2shu1guan3 zai4 dui4mian4 ma0?
translation_en: Excuse me, is the library across the street?
translation_ko: 실례합니다, 도서관이 맞은편에 있나요?

prompt_en: Listen and understand: arrive at a new place, ask directions, buy something, make small talk
text: 我想去買東西，你知道哪裡有商店嗎？
pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng qù mǎi dōngxī, nǐ zhīdào nǎlǐ yǒu shāngdiàn ma?
pinyin_numeric: wo3 xiang3 qu4 mai3 dong1xi1, ni3 zhi1dao4 na3li3 you3 shang1dian4 ma0?
translation_en: I want to go shopping, do you know where there is a store?
translation_ko: 물건을 사러 가고 싶은데, 어디에 가게가 있는지 아세요?

prompt_en: Listen and understand: arrive at a new place, ask directions, buy something, make small talk
text: 我認識一個朋友，他也住在這附近。
pinyin: Wǒ rènshi yī gè péngyou, tā yě zhù zài zhè fùjìn.
pinyin_numeric: wo3 ren4shi5 yi1 ge4 peng2you3, ta1 ye3 zhu4 zai4 zhe4 fu4jin4.
translation_en: I know a friend, he also lives near here.
translation_ko: 저는 친구를 한 명 아는데, 그분도 이 근처에 살아요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: arrive at a new place, ask directions, buy something, make small talk
text: 請問，到公園怎麼走？
pinyin: Qǐngwèn, dào gōngyuán zěnme zǒu?
pinyin_numeric: qing3wen4, dao4 gong1yuan2 zen3me zou3?
translation_en: Excuse me, how do I get to the park?
translation_ko: 실례합니다, 공원까지 어떻게 가나요?

prompt_en: Listen and understand: arrive at a new place, ask directions, buy something, make small talk
text: 請問，這附近有便利商店嗎？我想買東西。
pinyin: Qǐngwèn, zhè fùjìn yǒu biànlì shāngdiàn ma? Wǒ xiǎng mǎi dōngxi.
pinyin_numeric: qing3wen4, zhe4 fu4jin4 you3 bian4li4 shang1dian4 ma0? wo3 xiang3 mai3 dong1xi.
translation_en: Excuse me, is there a convenience store nearby? I want to buy something.
translation_ko: 실례합니다, 이 근처에 편의점이 있나요? 물건을 사고 싶어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: arrive at a new place, ask directions, buy something, make small talk
text: 請問，車站怎麼走？我想買車票。
pinyin: Qǐngwèn, chēzhàn zěnme zǒu? Wǒ xiǎng mǎi chēpiào.
pinyin_numeric: qing3wen4, che1zhan4 zen3me zou3? wo3 xiang3 mai3 che1piao4.
translation_en: Excuse me, how do I get to the station? I want to buy a ticket.
translation_ko: 실례합니다, 역까지 어떻게 가나요? 표를 사고 싶어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: arrive at a new place, ask directions, buy something, make small talk
text: 一直走，到路口左轉，便利商店就在對面。
pinyin: Yīzhí zǒu, dào lùkǒu zuǒ zhuǎn, biànlì shāngdiàn jiù zài duìmiàn.
pinyin_numeric: yi1zhi2 zou3, dao4 lu4kou3 zuo3 zhuan3, bian4li4 shang1dian4 jiu4 zai4 dui4mian4.
translation_en: Go straight, turn left at the intersection, and the convenience store is right across the street.
translation_ko: 계속 직진하다가 교차로에서 좌회전하면 편의점이 바로 맞은편에 있어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: arrive at a new place, ask directions, buy something, make small talk
text: 這個茶葉蛋多少錢？我想買兩個。
pinyin: Zhège cháyèdàn duōshao qián? Wǒ xiǎng mǎi liǎng gè.
pinyin_numeric: zhe4ge cha2ye4dan4 duo1shao qian2? wo3 xiang3 mai3 liang3 ge4.
translation_en: How much is this tea egg? I want to buy two.
translation_ko: 이 차(茶)알은 얼마인가요? 두 개 사고 싶어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: arrive at a new place, ask directions, buy something, make small talk
text: 可以算便宜一點嗎？我常常來這裡買東西。
pinyin: Kěyǐ suàn piányí yīdiǎn ma? Wǒ chángcháng lái zhèlǐ mǎi dōngxi.
pinyin_numeric: ke3yi3 suan4 pian2yi2 yi1dian3 ma0? wo3 chang2chang2 lai2 zhe4li3 mai3 dong1xi.
translation_en: Can you make it a little cheaper? I often come here to buy things.
translation_ko: 조금 깎아 주실 수 있나요? 저는 자주 여기서 물건을 사요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: arrive at a new place, ask directions, buy something, make small talk
text: 總共是八十五塊，找你十五塊。
pinyin: Zǒnggòng shì bāshíwǔ kuài, zhǎo nǐ shíwǔ kuài.
pinyin_numeric: zong3gong4 shi4 ba1shi2wu3 kuai4, zhao3 ni3 shi2wu3 kuai4.
translation_en: The total is 85 dollars, and here's your change of 15 dollars.
translation_ko: 총 85위안이고, 거스름돈 15위안입니다.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: arrive at a new place, ask directions, buy something, make small talk
text: 你住在附近嗎？我們可以一起聊天。
pinyin: Nǐ zhù zài fùjìn ma? Wǒmen kěyǐ yīqǐ liáotiān.
pinyin_numeric: ni3 zhu4 zai4 fu4jin4 ma0? wo3men ke3yi3 yi1qi3 liao2tian1.
translation_en: Do you live nearby? We can chat together.
translation_ko: 근처에 사시나요? 같이 이야기할 수 있어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: arrive at a new place, ask directions, buy something, make small talk
text: 我想認識新朋友，請問你叫什麼名字？
pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng rènshi xīn péngyou, qǐngwèn nǐ jiào shénme míngzì?
pinyin_numeric: wo3 xiang3 ren4shi xin1 peng2you, qing3wen4 ni3 jiao4 shen2me ming2zi4?
translation_en: I want to meet new friends. May I ask what your name is?
translation_ko: 새 친구를 사귀고 싶은데, 이름이 어떻게 되세요?

prompt_en: Listen and understand: arrive at a new place, ask directions, buy something, make small talk
text: 這個便當多少錢？我想買一個當午餐。
pinyin: Zhège biàndāng duōshao qián? Wǒ xiǎng mǎi yī gè dàng wǔcān.
pinyin_numeric: zhe4ge bian4dang1 duo1shao qian2? wo3 xiang3 mai3 yi1 ge4 dang4 wu3can1.
translation_en: How much is this bento box? I want to buy one for lunch.
translation_ko: 이 도시락은 얼마인가요? 점심으로 하나 사고 싶어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: arrive at a new place, ask directions, buy something, make small talk
text: 請問，這附近有咖啡店嗎？我想喝咖啡。
pinyin: Qǐngwèn, zhè fùjìn yǒu kāfēi diàn ma? Wǒ xiǎng hē kāfēi.
pinyin_numeric: qing3wen4, zhe4 fu4jin4 you3 ka1fei1 dian4 ma0? wo3 xiang3 he1 ka1fei1.
translation_en: Excuse me, is there a coffee shop nearby? I want to drink coffee.
translation_ko: 실례합니다, 이 근처에 커피숍이 있나요? 커피를 마시고 싶어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: health or housing problem from start to resolution
text: 我從早上到下午都在修理漏水的水龍頭。
pinyin: Wǒ cóng zǎoshang dào xiàwǔ dōu zài xiūlǐ lòushuǐ de shuǐlóngtóu.
pinyin_numeric: wo3 cong2 zao3shang5 dao4 xia4wu3 dou1 zai4 xiu1li3 lou4shui3 de5 shui3long2tou2.
translation_en: I was fixing the leaking faucet from morning to afternoon.
translation_ko: 저는 아침부터 오후까지 계속 물이 새는 수도꼭지를 고치고 있었어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: health or housing problem from start to resolution
text: 他從昨天開始頭痛，所以今天去看醫生了。
pinyin: Tā cóng zuótiān kāishǐ tóutòng, suǒyǐ jīntiān qù kàn yīshēng le.
pinyin_numeric: ta1 cong2 zuo2tian1 kai1shi3 tou2tong4, suo3yi3 jin1tian1 qu4 kan4 yi1sheng1 le5.
translation_en: He has had a headache since yesterday, so he went to see a doctor today.
translation_ko: 그는 어제부터 두통이 있어서 오늘 병원에 갔어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: health or housing problem from start to resolution
text: 我從掛號到看完醫生，只花了三十分鐘。
pinyin: Wǒ cóng guàhào dào kàn wán yīshēng, zhǐ huā le sānshí fēnzhōng.
pinyin_numeric: wo3 cong2 gua4hao4 dao4 kan4 wan2 yi1sheng1, zhi3 hua1 le5 san1shi2 fen1zhong1.
translation_en: From registering to finishing the doctor's visit, it only took me thirty minutes.
translation_ko: 접수부터 진료 끝날 때까지 겨우 30분밖에 안 걸렸어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: health or housing problem from start to resolution
text: 師傅從檢查到修理好冷氣，一共花了兩個小時。
pinyin: Shīfu cóng jiǎnchá dào xiūlǐ hǎo lěngqì, yígòng huā le liǎng ge xiǎoshí.
pinyin_numeric: shi1fu5 cong2 jian3cha2 dao4 xiu1li3 hao3 leng3qi4, yi2gong4 hua1 le5 liang3 ge5 xiao3shi2.
translation_en: The technician spent two hours in total from checking to fixing the air conditioner.
translation_ko: 기사님이 점검부터 에어컨 수리까지 총 두 시간이 걸렸어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: health or housing problem from start to resolution
text: 我從昨天到今天一直咳嗽，所以預約了明天看醫生。
pinyin: Wǒ cóng zuótiān dào jīntiān yìzhí késòu, suǒyǐ yùyuē le míngtiān kàn yīshēng.
pinyin_numeric: wo3 cong2 zuo2tian1 dao4 jin1tian1 yi4zhi2 ke2sou4, suo3yi3 yu4yue1 le5 ming2tian1 kan4 yi1sheng1.
translation_en: I have been coughing from yesterday to today, so I made an appointment to see a doctor tomorrow.
translation_ko: 어제부터 오늘까지 계속 기침을 해서 내일 병원 예약을 했어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: health or housing problem from start to resolution
text: 他從發燒到退燒，都在家裡休息。
pinyin: Tā cóng fāshāo dào tuìshāo, dōu zài jiālǐ xiūxí.
pinyin_numeric: ta1 cong2 fa1shao1 dao4 tui4shao1, dou1 zai4 jia1li3 xiu1xi2.
translation_en: From having a fever to it going away, he rested at home the whole time.
translation_ko: 그는 열이 나기 시작해서 열이 내릴 때까지 집에서 계속 쉬었어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: health or housing problem from start to resolution
text: 我從打電話預約到確認時間，只用了五分鐘。
pinyin: Wǒ cóng dǎ diànhuà yùyuē dào quèrèn shíjiān, zhǐ yòng le wǔ fēnzhōng.
pinyin_numeric: wo3 cong2 da3 dian4hua4 yu4yue1 dao4 que4ren4 shi2jian1, zhi3 yong4 le5 wu3 fen1zhong1.
translation_en: From calling to make an appointment to confirming the time, it only took me five minutes.
translation_ko: 전화로 예약하는 것부터 시간 확인까지 단 5분밖에 안 걸렸어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: health or housing problem from start to resolution
text: 他從頭痛到喉嚨痛，症狀越來越嚴重。
pinyin: Tā cóng tóutòng dào hóulóng tòng, zhèngzhuàng yuè lái yuè yánzhòng.
pinyin_numeric: ta1 cong2 tou2tong4 dao4 hou2long2 tong4, zheng4zhuang4 yue4 lai2 yue4 yan2zhong4.
translation_en: From a headache to a sore throat, his symptoms are getting more and more serious.
translation_ko: 두통에서부터 인후통까지, 증상이 점점 심해지고 있어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: health or housing problem from start to resolution
text: 我從安排師傅來修理到檢查完，都在旁邊看著。
pinyin: Wǒ cóng ānpái shīfu lái xiūlǐ dào jiǎnchá wán, dōu zài pángbiān kàn zhe.
pinyin_numeric: wo3 cong2 an1pai2 shi1fu5 lai2 xiu1li3 dao4 jian3cha2 wan2, dou1 zai4 pang2bian1 kan4 zhe5.
translation_en: From arranging for the technician to come fix it to finishing the inspection, I was watching from the side the whole time.
translation_ko: 기사님을 수리하러 오도록安排하는 것부터 점검이 끝날 때까지 계속 옆에서 지켜봤어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: health or housing problem from start to resolution
text: 他從取消預約到重新安排，只花了十分鐘。
pinyin: Tā cóng qǔxiāo yùyuē dào chóngxīn ānpái, zhǐ huā le shí fēnzhōng.
pinyin_numeric: ta1 cong2 qu3xiao1 yu4yue1 dao4 chong2xin1 an1pai2, zhi3 hua1 le5 shi2 fen1zhong1.
translation_en: From canceling the appointment to rescheduling, it only took him ten minutes.
translation_ko: 그는 예약 취소부터 재安排까지 단 10분밖에 안 걸렸어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: health or housing problem from start to resolution
text: 我家的水龍頭漏水了，需要找師傅來修理。
pinyin: Wǒ jiā de shuǐlóngtóu lòushuǐ le, xūyào zhǎo shīfu lái xiūlǐ.
pinyin_numeric: wo3 jia1 de shui3long2tou2 lou4shui3 le0, xu1yao4 zhao3 shi1fu0 lai2 xiu1li3.
translation_en: The faucet in my house is leaking, I need to find a repairman to fix it.
translation_ko: 우리 집 수도꼭지가 새고 있어서, 수리 기사님을 불러서 고쳐야 해요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: health or housing problem from start to resolution
text: 你發燒又咳嗽，需要去看醫生。
pinyin: Nǐ fāshāo yòu késòu, xūyào qù kàn yīshēng.
pinyin_numeric: ni3 fa1shao1 you4 ke2sou4, xu1yao4 qu4 kan4 yi1sheng1.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: health or housing problem from start to resolution
text: 我頭痛得很厲害，需要先掛號再等醫生。
pinyin: Wǒ tóutòng de hěn lìhài, xūyào xiān guàhào zài děng yīshēng.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: health or housing problem from start to resolution
text: 師傅說馬桶壞掉了，需要換一個新的零件。

translation_ko: 수리 기사님이 변기가 고장 났으니 새 부품으로 교체해야 한다고 했어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: health or housing problem from start to resolution
text: 我已經預約了明天早上看醫生，需要取消嗎？

translation_en: I already made an appointment to see the doctor tomorrow morning, do I need to cancel it?
translation_ko: 내일 아침에 의사 진료를 예약했는데, 취소해야 하나요?

prompt_en: Listen and understand: health or housing problem from start to resolution

prompt_en: Listen and understand: health or housing problem from start to resolution

prompt_en: Listen and understand: health or housing problem from start to resolution
text: 如果師傅今天不能來，我需要重新安排時間。

translation_ko: 수리 기사님이 오늘 오실 수 없으면, 시간을 다시 조정해야 해요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: health or housing problem from start to resolution

pinyin: Nǐ hóulóng tòng, xūyào duō hē rè shuǐ.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: health or housing problem from start to resolution

pinyin: Shīfu jiǎnchá yǐhòu, shuō rèshuǐqì xūyào xiūlǐ.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: social plan with conflict and rescheduling
text: 我本來想邀請你來參加派對，但因為臨時有事，所以取消了。
pinyin: Wǒ běnlái xiǎng yāoqǐng nǐ lái cānjiā pàiduì, dàn yīnwèi línshí yǒu shì, suǒyǐ qǔxiāo le.

translation_ko: 원래 당신을 파티에 초대하고 싶었는데, 갑자기 일이 생겨서 취소했어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: social plan with conflict and rescheduling
text: 他本來要跟我們一起去吃飯，但因為臨時加班，所以改期了。
pinyin: Tā běnlái yào gēn wǒmen yīqǐ qù chīfàn, dàn yīnwèi línshí jiābān, suǒyǐ gǎiqī le.

translation_ko: 그는 원래 우리와 같이 밥 먹으러 가려고 했는데, 갑자기 야근이 생겨서 날짜를 변경했어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: social plan with conflict and rescheduling

prompt_en: Listen and understand: social plan with conflict and rescheduling

translation_ko: 원래 이번 주말에 여행 가려고 했는데, 갑자기 일이 생겨서 연기했어요?

prompt_en: Listen and understand: social plan with conflict and rescheduling
text: 我本來想邀請他來看電影，但因為他已經有別的行程，所以婉拒了。

translation_en: I originally wanted to invite him to watch a movie, but because he already had other plans, he politely declined.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: social plan with conflict and rescheduling
text: 他們本來約好下個星期見面，但因為臨時有衝突，所以改期了。

prompt_en: Listen and understand: social plan with conflict and rescheduling
text: 我本來要跟你一起喝咖啡，但因為臨時要開會，所以取消了，真抱歉。
pinyin: Wǒ běnlái yào gēn nǐ yīqǐ hē kāfēi, dàn yīnwèi línshí yào kāihuì, suǒyǐ qǔxiāo le, zhēn bàoqiàn.
pinyin_numeric: wo3 ben3lai2 yao4 gen1 ni3 yi1qi3 he1 ka1fei1, dan4 yin1wei4 lin2shi2 yao4 kai1hui4, suo3yi3 qu3xiao1 le5, zhen1 bao4qian4.
translation_en: I originally wanted to have coffee with you, but because I suddenly had a meeting, I canceled it. I'm really sorry.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: social plan with conflict and rescheduling
text: 她本來打算這個週末來台北，但因為臨時有事，所以改期到下個星期了。

translation_en: She originally planned to come to Taipei this weekend, but because something came up, she rescheduled to next week.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: social plan with conflict and rescheduling

translation_en: We originally agreed to go shopping together, but because it suddenly rained, we canceled.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: social plan with conflict and rescheduling

translation_en: You originally wanted to invite her to your birthday party, but because she was suddenly unavailable, did she politely decline?
translation_ko: 원래 그녀를 생일 파티에 초대하고 싶었는데, 그녀가 갑자기 시간이 안 돼서 정중히 거절했어요?

prompt_en: Listen and understand: social plan with conflict and rescheduling
text: 我想邀請你去看電影，但你婉拒了，因為你臨時有工作。
pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng yāoqǐng nǐ qù kàn diànyǐng, dàn nǐ wǎnjù le, yīnwèi nǐ línshí yǒu gōngzuò.

translation_en: I wanted to invite you to watch a movie, but you declined because you had an unexpected work commitment.
translation_ko: 영화 보러 초대하고 싶었는데, 갑작스러운 일이 생겨서 거절하셨네요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: social plan with conflict and rescheduling

translation_en: He invited me to his birthday party, but I declined because I already had other plans that day.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: social plan with conflict and rescheduling

prompt_en: Listen and understand: social plan with conflict and rescheduling

pinyin: Wǒ yāoqǐng nǐ lái wǒ jiā chī wǎncān, dàn nǐ wǎnjù le, yīnwèi nǐ línshí yào jiābān.

translation_en: I invited you to come to my place for dinner, but you declined because you had to work overtime unexpectedly.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: social plan with conflict and rescheduling
text: 她邀請我一起去逛街，可是我婉拒了，因為我已經跟朋友約好了。

prompt_en: Listen and understand: social plan with conflict and rescheduling

translation_en: You wanted to invite me to visit your new home, but I declined because I had no free time that day.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: social plan with conflict and rescheduling

translation_en: I invited you to go see an exhibition this weekend, but you declined because you thought the tickets were too expensive.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: social plan with conflict and rescheduling
text: 他邀請我週五晚上一起吃飯，可是我婉拒了，因為我臨時要出差。
pinyin: Tā yāoqǐng wǒ zhōuwǔ wǎnshàng yīqǐ chīfàn, kěshì wǒ wǎnjù le, yīnwèi wǒ línshí yào chūchāi.

translation_en: He invited me to have dinner together on Friday evening, but I declined because I had an unexpected business trip.
translation_ko: 금요일 저녁에 같이 밥 먹자고 초대했지만, 갑자기 출장 가야 해서 거절했어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: social plan with conflict and rescheduling
text: 我們想邀請你參加明天的會議，但你婉拒了，因為你覺得時間有衝突。
pinyin: Wǒmen xiǎng yāoqǐng nǐ cānjiā míngtiān de huìyì, dàn nǐ wǎnjù le, yīnwèi nǐ juéde shíjiān yǒu chōngtū.

translation_en: We wanted to invite you to tomorrow's meeting, but you declined because you felt there was a time conflict.
translation_ko: 내일 회의에 초대하고 싶었지만, 시간이 겹친다고 거절하셨네요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: social plan with conflict and rescheduling
text: 我邀請你下週一起去旅行，但你婉拒了，因為你已經有別的計畫了。
pinyin: Wǒ yāoqǐng nǐ xiàzhōu yīqǐ qù lǚxíng, dàn nǐ wǎnjù le, yīnwèi nǐ yǐjīng yǒu biéde jìhuà le.
pinyin_numeric: wo3 yao1qing3 ni3 xia4zhou1 yi4qi3 qu4 lv3xing2, dan4 ni3 wan3ju4 le5, yin1wei4 ni3 yi3jing1 you3 bie2de5 ji4hua4 le5.
translation_en: I invited you to travel together next week, but you declined because you already had other plans.
translation_ko: 다음 주에 같이 여행 가자고 초대했는데, 이미 다른 계획이 있다고 거절하셨네요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: unrehearsed everyday conversation simulation
text: 如果你明天有空的話，我們就一起去咖啡店喝咖啡。
pinyin: Rúguǒ nǐ míngtiān yǒu kòng dehuà, wǒmen jiù yīqǐ qù kāfēidiàn hē kāfēi.
pinyin_numeric: ru2guo3 ni3 ming2tian1 you3 kong4 de5hua4, wo3men jiu4 yi1qi3 qu4 ka1fei1dian4 he1 ka1fei1.
translation_en: If you have free time tomorrow, we'll go to a coffee shop together to drink coffee.
translation_ko: 내일 시간이 있으시면, 저희가 함께 커피숍에 가서 커피를 마셔요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: unrehearsed everyday conversation simulation
text: 如果這件衣服太貴的話，我就不要買了。
pinyin: Rúguǒ zhè jiàn yīfú tài guì dehuà, wǒ jiù bù yào mǎi le.
pinyin_numeric: ru2guo3 zhe4 jian4 yi1fu2 tai4 gui4 de5hua4, wo3 jiu4 bu4 yao4 mai3 le5.
translation_en: If this piece of clothing is too expensive, I won't buy it.
translation_ko: 이 옷이 너무 비싸다면, 저는 사지 않을 거예요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: unrehearsed everyday conversation simulation
text: 如果明天颱風來了的話，我們就取消去公園的計畫。
pinyin: Rúguǒ míngtiān táifēng lái le dehuà, wǒmen jiù qǔxiāo qù gōngyuán de jìhuà.
pinyin_numeric: ru2guo3 ming2tian1 tai2feng1 lai2 le5 de5hua4, wo3men jiu4 qu3xiao1 qu4 gong1yuan2 de5 ji4hua4.
translation_en: If a typhoon comes tomorrow, we'll cancel the plan to go to the park.
translation_ko: 내일 태풍이 온다면, 공원에 가는 계획을 취소할 거예요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: unrehearsed everyday conversation simulation
text: 如果你想吃牛肉麵的話，我們就去那家小吃店。
pinyin: Rúguǒ nǐ xiǎng chī niúròumiàn dehuà, wǒmen jiù qù nà jiā xiǎochīdiàn.
pinyin_numeric: ru2guo3 ni3 xiang3 chi1 niu2rou4mian4 de5hua4, wo3men jiu4 qu4 na4 jia1 xiao3chi1dian4.
translation_en: If you want to eat beef noodles, we'll go to that snack shop.
translation_ko: 소고기 국수를 먹고 싶다면, 그 작은 음식점에 갈 거예요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: unrehearsed everyday conversation simulation
text: 如果下雨了的話，你就帶一把雨傘出門。
pinyin: Rúguǒ xià yǔ le dehuà, nǐ jiù dài yī bǎ yǔsǎn chūmén.
pinyin_numeric: ru2guo3 xia4 yu3 le5 de5hua4, ni3 jiu4 dai4 yi1 ba3 yu3san3 chu1men2.
translation_en: If it rains, you should take an umbrella when you go out.
translation_ko: 비가 온다면, 우산을 가지고 나가세요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: unrehearsed everyday conversation simulation
text: 如果你不喜歡喝紅茶的話，就換成綠茶吧。
pinyin: Rúguǒ nǐ bù xǐhuān hē hóngchá dehuà, jiù huàn chéng lǜchá ba.
pinyin_numeric: ru2guo3 ni3 bu4 xi3huan1 he1 hong2cha2 de5hua4, jiu4 huan4 cheng2 lü4cha2 ba5.
translation_en: If you don't like drinking black tea, then switch to green tea.
translation_ko: 홍차를 좋아하지 않는다면, 녹차로 바꾸세요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: unrehearsed everyday conversation simulation
text: 如果我們走錯路的話，就用導航找一下。
pinyin: Rúguǒ wǒmen zǒu cuò lù dehuà, jiù yòng dǎoháng zhǎo yīxià.
pinyin_numeric: ru2guo3 wo3men zou3 cuo4 lu4 de5hua4, jiu4 yong4 dao3hang2 zhao3 yi1xia4.
translation_en: If we take the wrong road, we'll use the navigation to find it.
translation_ko: 길을 잘못 들었다면, 내비게이션을 사용해서 찾아봐요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: unrehearsed everyday conversation simulation
text: 如果你覺得太累了的話，就先休息一下再繼續。
pinyin: Rúguǒ nǐ juéde tài lèi le dehuà, jiù xiān xiūxí yīxià zài jìxù.
pinyin_numeric: ru2guo3 ni3 jue2de5 tai4 lei4 le5 de5hua4, jiu4 xian1 xiu1xi2 yi1xia4 zai4 ji4xu4.
translation_en: If you feel too tired, take a rest first and then continue.
translation_ko: 너무 피곤하다고 느끼면, 먼저 좀 쉬고 나서 계속하세요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: unrehearsed everyday conversation simulation
text: 如果這家餐廳沒有座位的話，我們就去別的地方吃。
pinyin: Rúguǒ zhè jiā cāntīng méiyǒu zuòwèi dehuà, wǒmen jiù qù bié de dìfāng chī.
pinyin_numeric: ru2guo3 zhe4 jia1 can1ting1 mei2you3 zuo4wei4 de5hua4, wo3men jiu4 qu4 bie2 de5 di4fang1 chi1.
translation_en: If this restaurant has no seats, we'll go eat somewhere else.
translation_ko: 이 식당에 자리가 없다면, 다른 곳에 가서 먹어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: unrehearsed everyday conversation simulation
text: 如果你要買東西的話，記得帶環保袋。
pinyin: Rúguǒ nǐ yào mǎi dōngxī dehuà, jìde dài huánbǎo dài.
pinyin_numeric: ru2guo3 ni3 yao4 mai3 dong1xi1 de5hua4, ji4de5 dai4 huan2bao3 dai4.
translation_en: If you want to buy things, remember to bring an eco-friendly bag.
translation_ko: 물건을 사려면, 친환경 가방을 가져오는 것을 기억하세요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: unrehearsed everyday conversation simulation
text: 我正在看書，等一下再跟你聊天。
pinyin: Wǒ zhèngzài kàn shū, děng yīxià zài gēn nǐ liáotiān.
pinyin_numeric: wo3 zheng4zai4 kan4 shu1, deng3 yi1xia4 zai4 gen1 ni3 liao2tian1.
translation_en: I am reading a book; I'll chat with you later.
translation_ko: 저는 지금 책을 보고 있어요. 잠시 후에 당신과 이야기할게요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: unrehearsed everyday conversation simulation
text: 他正在吃早餐，所以不能接電話。
pinyin: Tā zhèngzài chī zǎocān, suǒyǐ bù néng jiē diànhuà.
pinyin_numeric: ta1 zheng4zai4 chi1 zao3can1, suo3yi3 bu4 neng2 jie1 dian4hua4.
translation_en: He is eating breakfast, so he can't answer the phone.
translation_ko: 그는 지금 아침을 먹고 있어서 전화를 받을 수 없어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: unrehearsed everyday conversation simulation
text: 我們正在等公車，今天早上有點冷。
pinyin: Wǒmen zhèngzài děng gōngchē, jīntiān zǎoshang yǒudiǎn lěng.
pinyin_numeric: wo3men zheng4zai4 deng3 gong1che1, jin1tian1 zao3shang5 you3dian3 leng3.
translation_en: We are waiting for the bus; it's a bit cold this morning.
translation_ko: 우리는 지금 버스를 기다리고 있어요. 오늘 아침은 좀 추워요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: unrehearsed everyday conversation simulation
text: 她正在洗澡，請你等一下再打來。
pinyin: Tā zhèngzài xǐzǎo, qǐng nǐ děng yīxià zài dǎ lái.
pinyin_numeric: ta1 zheng4zai4 xi3zao3, qing3 ni3 deng3 yi1xia4 zai4 da3 lai2.
translation_en: She is taking a shower; please call back later.
translation_ko: 그녀는 지금 샤워 중이에요. 잠시 후에 다시 전화해 주세요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: unrehearsed everyday conversation simulation
text: 我媽媽正在煮飯，廚房很香。
pinyin: Wǒ māma zhèngzài zhǔfàn, chúfáng hěn xiāng.
pinyin_numeric: wo3 ma1ma zheng4zai4 zhu3fan4, chu2fang2 hen3 xiang1.
translation_en: My mom is cooking; the kitchen smells very good.
translation_ko: 우리 엄마는 지금 밥을 짓고 있어요. 부엌에서 좋은 냄새가 나요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: unrehearsed everyday conversation simulation
text: 你正在做什麼？我想找你一起去吃午餐。
pinyin: Nǐ zhèngzài zuò shénme? Wǒ xiǎng zhǎo nǐ yīqǐ qù chī wǔcān.
pinyin_numeric: ni3 zheng4zai4 zuo4 shen2me5? wo3 xiang3 zhao3 ni3 yi1qi3 qu4 chi1 wu3can1.
translation_en: What are you doing? I want to go have lunch with you.
translation_ko: 지금 뭐 하고 있어요? 당신과 함께 점심 먹으러 가고 싶어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: unrehearsed everyday conversation simulation
text: 他們正在看電影，所以不要打電話給他們。
pinyin: Tāmen zhèngzài kàn diànyǐng, suǒyǐ bùyào dǎ diànhuà gěi tāmen.
pinyin_numeric: ta1men zheng4zai4 kan4 dian4ying3, suo3yi3 bu4yao4 da3 dian4hua4 gei3 ta1men.
translation_en: They are watching a movie, so don't call them.
translation_ko: 그들은 지금 영화를 보고 있어요. 그러니까 전화하지 마세요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: unrehearsed everyday conversation simulation
text: 我哥哥正在睡覺，請你小聲一點。
pinyin: Wǒ gēge zhèngzài shuìjiào, qǐng nǐ xiǎoshēng yīdiǎn.
pinyin_numeric: wo3 ge1ge zheng4zai4 shui4jiao4, qing3 ni3 xiao3sheng1 yi1dian3.
translation_en: My older brother is sleeping; please be a little quieter.
translation_ko: 우리 오빠는 지금 자고 있어요. 조금 조용히 해 주세요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: unrehearsed everyday conversation simulation
text: 她正在寫功課，所以現在沒有空。
pinyin: Tā zhèngzài xiě gōngkè, suǒyǐ xiànzài méiyǒu kòng.
pinyin_numeric: ta1 zheng4zai4 xie3 gong1ke4, suo3yi3 xian4zai4 mei2you3 kong4.
translation_en: She is doing homework, so she is not free right now.
translation_ko: 그녀는 지금 숙제를 하고 있어서 지금은 시간이 없어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: unrehearsed everyday conversation simulation
text: 我們正在餐廳吃飯，你要不要一起來？
pinyin: Wǒmen zhèngzài cāntīng chīfàn, nǐ yào bùyào yīqǐ lái?
pinyin_numeric: wo3men zheng4zai4 can1ting1 chi1fan4, ni3 yao4 bu4yao4 yi1qi3 lai2?
translation_en: We are eating at a restaurant; do you want to come along?
translation_ko: 우리는 지금 식당에서 밥을 먹고 있어요. 같이 올래요?

prompt_en: Listen and understand: 90-day final speaking, listening, reading, and writing checkpoint
text: 我從早上八點工作到下午五點。
pinyin: Wǒ cóng zǎoshang bā diǎn gōngzuò dào xiàwǔ wǔ diǎn.
pinyin_numeric: wo3 cong2 zao3shang4 ba1 dian3 gong1zuo4 dao4 xia4wu3 wu3 dian3.
translation_en: I work from 8 AM to 5 PM.
translation_ko: 저는 아침 8시부터 오후 5시까지 일합니다.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: 90-day final speaking, listening, reading, and writing checkpoint
text: 他從台北坐火車到高雄。
pinyin: Tā cóng Táiběi zuò huǒchē dào Gāoxióng.
pinyin_numeric: ta1 cong2 Tai2bei3 zuo4 huo3che1 dao4 Gao1xiong2.
translation_en: He takes the train from Taipei to Kaohsiung.
translation_ko: 그는 타이베이에서 가오슝까지 기차를 타고 갑니다.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: 90-day final speaking, listening, reading, and writing checkpoint
text: 我們從星期一到星期五都有課。
pinyin: Wǒmen cóng xīngqī yī dào xīngqī wǔ dōu yǒu kè.
pinyin_numeric: wo3men cong2 xing1qi1 yi1 dao4 xing1qi1 wu3 dou1 you3 ke4.
translation_en: We have classes from Monday to Friday.
translation_ko: 우리는 월요일부터 금요일까지 수업이 있습니다.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: 90-day final speaking, listening, reading, and writing checkpoint
text: 你從哪裡到這裡？
pinyin: Nǐ cóng nǎlǐ dào zhèlǐ?
pinyin_numeric: ni3 cong2 na3li3 dao4 zhe4li3?
translation_en: Where did you come from to get here?
translation_ko: 어디에서 여기까지 오셨나요?

prompt_en: Listen and understand: 90-day final speaking, listening, reading, and writing checkpoint
text: 我從昨天開始感冒到今天還沒好。
pinyin: Wǒ cóng zuótiān kāishǐ gǎnmào dào jīntiān hái méi hǎo.
pinyin_numeric: wo3 cong2 zuo2tian1 kai1shi3 gan3mao4 dao4 jin1tian1 hai2 mei2 hao3.
translation_en: I've had a cold from yesterday until today and it's still not better.
translation_ko: 저는 어제부터 오늘까지 감기에 걸려서 아직 낫지 않았어요.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: 90-day final speaking, listening, reading, and writing checkpoint
text: 這家餐廳從中午營業到晚上十點。
pinyin: Zhè jiā cāntīng cóng zhōngwǔ yíngyè dào wǎnshàng shí diǎn.
pinyin_numeric: zhe4 jia1 can1ting1 cong2 zhong1wu3 ying2ye4 dao4 wan3shang4 shi2 dian3.
translation_en: This restaurant is open from noon to 10 PM.
translation_ko: 이 식당은 정오부터 밤 10시까지 영업합니다.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: 90-day final speaking, listening, reading, and writing checkpoint
text: 他從家裡走到學校要二十分鐘。
pinyin: Tā cóng jiā lǐ zǒu dào xuéxiào yào èrshí fēnzhōng.
pinyin_numeric: ta1 cong2 jia1 li3 zou3 dao4 xue2xiao4 yao4 er4shi2 fen1zhong1.
translation_en: It takes him 20 minutes to walk from home to school.
translation_ko: 그는 집에서 학교까지 걸어서 20분 걸립니다.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: 90-day final speaking, listening, reading, and writing checkpoint
text: 我們從捷運站走到公園只要五分鐘。
pinyin: Wǒmen cóng jiéyùn zhàn zǒu dào gōngyuán zhǐ yào wǔ fēnzhōng.
pinyin_numeric: wo3men cong2 jie2yun4 zhan4 zou3 dao4 gong1yuan2 zhi3 yao4 wu3 fen1zhong1.
translation_en: It only takes us five minutes to walk from the MRT station to the park.
translation_ko: 저희는 지하철역에서 공원까지 걸어서 5분밖에 안 걸립니다.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: 90-day final speaking, listening, reading, and writing checkpoint
text: 你從幾點到幾點有空？
pinyin: Nǐ cóng jǐ diǎn dào jǐ diǎn yǒu kòng?
pinyin_numeric: ni3 cong2 ji3 dian3 dao4 ji3 dian3 you3 kong4?
translation_en: From what time to what time are you free?
translation_ko: 몇 시부터 몇 시까지 시간이 되세요?

prompt_en: Listen and understand: 90-day final speaking, listening, reading, and writing checkpoint
text: 我從今天開始學中文，到明年希望可以說得很流利。
pinyin: Wǒ cóng jīntiān kāishǐ xué zhōngwén, dào míngnián xīwàng kěyǐ shuō de hěn liúlì.
pinyin_numeric: wo3 cong2 jin1tian1 kai1shi3 xue2 zhong1wen2, dao4 ming2nian2 xi1wang4 ke3yi3 shuo1 de5 hen3 liu2li4.
translation_en: I start learning Chinese today, and I hope to speak it fluently by next year.
translation_ko: 저는 오늘부터 중국어를 배우기 시작해서 내년까지 유창하게 말할 수 있기를 바랍니다.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: 90-day final speaking, listening, reading, and writing checkpoint
text: 除了中文以外，我也會說一點英文。
pinyin: Chúle zhōngwén yǐwài, wǒ yě huì shuō yīdiǎn yīngwén.
pinyin_numeric: chu2le zhong1wen2 yi3wai4, wo3 ye3 hui4 shuo1 yi1dian3 ying1wen2.
translation_en: Besides Chinese, I can also speak a little English.
translation_ko: 중국어 외에도 저는 영어도 조금 할 수 있습니다.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: 90-day final speaking, listening, reading, and writing checkpoint
text: 除了看電影以外，他也很喜歡聽音樂。
pinyin: Chúle kàn diànyǐng yǐwài, tā yě hěn xǐhuān tīng yīnyuè.
pinyin_numeric: chu2le kan4 dian4ying3 yi3wai4, ta1 ye3 hen3 xi3huan1 ting1 yin1yue4.
translation_en: In addition to watching movies, he also really likes listening to music.
translation_ko: 영화 보는 것 외에도 그는 음악 듣는 것을 아주 좋아합니다.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: 90-day final speaking, listening, reading, and writing checkpoint
text: 除了台北以外，我們還想去台中玩。
pinyin: Chúle Táiběi yǐwài, wǒmen hái xiǎng qù Táizhōng wán.
pinyin_numeric: chu2le Tai2bei3 yi3wai4, wo3men hai2 xiang3 qu4 Tai2zhong1 wan2.
translation_en: Besides Taipei, we also want to go to Taichung to have fun.
translation_ko: 타이베이 외에도 우리는 타이중에도 놀러 가고 싶습니다.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: 90-day final speaking, listening, reading, and writing checkpoint
text: 除了牛肉麵以外，這家店的滷肉飯也很好吃。
pinyin: Chúle niúròumiàn yǐwài, zhè jiā diàn de lǔròufàn yě hěn hǎochī.
pinyin_numeric: chu2le niu2rou4mian4 yi3wai4, zhe4 jia1 dian4 de lu3rou4fan4 ye3 hen3 hao3chi1.
translation_en: In addition to beef noodles, the braised pork rice at this restaurant is also delicious.
translation_ko: 소고기 국수 외에도 이 가게의 루로우판도 아주 맛있습니다.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: 90-day final speaking, listening, reading, and writing checkpoint
text: 除了工作以外，他平時也喜歡運動。
pinyin: Chúle gōngzuò yǐwài, tā píngshí yě xǐhuān yùndòng.
pinyin_numeric: chu2le gong1zuo4 yi3wai4, ta1 ping2shi2 ye3 xi3huan1 yun4dong4.
translation_en: Besides work, he also likes to exercise in his free time.
translation_ko: 일 외에도 그는 평소에 운동하는 것을 좋아합니다.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: 90-day final speaking, listening, reading, and writing checkpoint
text: 除了珍珠奶茶以外，我也很喜歡喝綠茶。
pinyin: Chúle zhēnzhū nǎichá yǐwài, wǒ yě hěn xǐhuān hē lǜchá.
pinyin_numeric: chu2le zhen1zhu1 nai3cha2 yi3wai4, wo3 ye3 hen3 xi3huan1 he1 lü4cha2.
translation_en: Besides bubble tea, I also really like drinking green tea.
translation_ko: 버블티 외에도 저는 녹차를 마시는 것을 아주 좋아합니다.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: 90-day final speaking, listening, reading, and writing checkpoint
text: 除了上課以外，他下課後還要去打工。
pinyin: Chúle shàngkè yǐwài, tā xiàkè hòu hái yào qù dǎgōng.
pinyin_numeric: chu2le shang4ke4 yi3wai4, ta1 xia4ke4 hou4 hai2 yao4 qu4 da3gong1.
translation_en: Besides attending class, he also has to go to a part-time job after class.
translation_ko: 수업 외에도 그는 방과 후에 아르바이트를 하러 가야 합니다.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: 90-day final speaking, listening, reading, and writing checkpoint
text: 除了這件衣服以外，那件外套的顏色我也很喜歡。
pinyin: Chúle zhè jiàn yīfu yǐwài, nà jiàn wàitào de yánsè wǒ yě hěn xǐhuān.
pinyin_numeric: chu2le zhe4 jian4 yi1fu yi3wai4, na4 jian4 wai4tao4 de yan2se4 wo3 ye3 hen3 xi3huan1.
translation_en: Besides this piece of clothing, I also really like the color of that jacket.
translation_ko: 이 옷 외에도 저는 저 코트의 색깔도 아주 좋아합니다.

prompt_en: Listen and understand: 90-day final speaking, listening, reading, and writing checkpoint
